channel.title: Real-Time on Jorge Prado - AI Engineer
channel.description: Recent content in Real-Time on Jorge Prado - AI Engineer

item.title: AI Voice Agent Framework
item.description: End-to-end framework for building conversational AI agents with voice I/O, integrating speech-to-text, LLM reasoning, and text-to-speech synthesis.

item.title: Robotics Vision Perception Module
item.description: Real-time object detection and pose estimation for autonomous robot navigation and manipulation.
